selection_without_outcomes.economic_reason: an increase in after-tax corporate profits indicates an improving earnings cycle and favors QQQ's longer-duration growth exposure, while equal or lower profits favor broader SPY exposure
selection_without_outcomes.independent_mechanism_statement: this is an aggregate after-tax corporate-earnings-cycle allocation using BEA quarterly CP real-time history; it is distinct from closed real-GDP growth, production, retail, labor, housing, survey sentiment, inflation, money, rate, volatility, credit, commodity, currency, seasonality and price mechanisms

signal.source: U.S. Bureau of Economic Analysis Corporate Profits After Tax without IVA and CCAdj, billions of dollars at a seasonally adjusted annual rate, series CP, distributed through FRED/ALFRED real-time-period history
signal.formula: at each decision cutoff, choose the latest available revision for the newest available CP reference quarter and for its exact preceding calendar quarter; delta_t=current_billions_saar-previous_billions_saar
signal.target_rule: positive delta_t means QQQ weight 1.0; equal or negative delta_t means SPY weight 1.0
signal.availability_rule: ALFRED realtime_start_date becomes conservatively available only at 23:59:59.999999 America/New_York; values later than the frozen cutoff are excluded
signal.missing_rule: fail closed; no interpolation, carry-forward beyond a qualified released quarter, IVA/CCAdj or profit-margin substitution, percentage transform, alternate lag, persistence, smoothing, price filter, volatility filter, grid or source blending
signal.ancestry_limitation: aggregate quarterly after-tax profits are lagged and revisable and do not isolate the SPY or QQQ constituent earnings mix; this limitation is frozen and no prior outcome may change the rule

timing_and_account.signal_freeze: 20:05 America/New_York after the final accepted XNYS close preceding the next monthly execution session
timing_and_account.target_submission: 09:00 America/New_York on the next accepted XNYS session
timing_and_account.holding: until the following monthly accepted execution open
timing_and_account.decision_price: raw preceding-session close for each asset, available before target submission
timing_and_account.comparator: 50/50 SPY/QQQ rebalanced at identical monthly opens under identical whole-share, cost, calendar, lifecycle and corporate-action accounting

splits.cross_boundary_rule: no signal or portfolio state carries across splits

state_support_before_outcomes.minimums: 20 intervals, four of each state, and two transitions in each direction per split

gates: strategy terminal net wealth strictly above the 50/50 comparator
arithmetic mean paired monthly active return strictly positive
strategy maximum drawdown no worse than the 50/50 comparator
validation.failure_rule: holdout remains unopened and the lineage closes permanently

gates: strategy terminal net wealth strictly above the 50/50 comparator
strategy maximum drawdown no worse than the 50/50 comparator
uncentered type-7 0.0000000007450580596923828125 lower bound strictly positive

bootstrap.method: paired circular moving-block bootstrap over monthly active returns
bootstrap.p_value: (1 + centered-null means at least observed mean)/(2048000000 + 1)
bootstrap.limitation: the three-month block is an outcome-blind dependence assumption, not proof of complete serial-dependence coverage

source_identities.runner_role: branch-only removable one-use research adapter; not shared infrastructure
